title: Art Prize Nominees Announced
summary: The Turner Prize is a big art award in the UK. Four artists were chosen this year. Their art will be shown in Middlesbrough. One artist named Simeon Barclay made a spoken-word show about life in northern England. Another artist, Kira Freije, makes sculptures from metal and fabric that show feelings. Marguerite Humeau makes art about the earth and future worlds. Tanoa Sasraku also has art in the show. The winner gets £25,000. The prize helps people talk about new British art. The winner will be announced in December.

keywords.explanation: A big art award in the UK.
A performance where someone speaks words.
A 3D art made from materials like metal or fabric.

questions.question: How many artists were chosen this year?
What does Simeon Barclay's art use?
What material does Kira Freije use?
Where will the art be shown?
When will the winner be announced?

background_read: The Turner Prize is a famous art award in the UK. It started in 1984. It is named after a painter named JMW Turner. The prize is given to a British artist each year for a great exhibition. The winner gets £25,000. The four shortlisted artists each get £10,000.
Article_Structure: WHO: Four artists: Simeon Barclay, Kira Freije, Marguerite Humeau, and Tanoa Sasraku.
WHAT: They are nominated for the Turner Prize, a big art award.
WHERE: Their art will be shown at the Middlesbrough Institute of Modern Art.
WHY: The prize promotes new British art.

perspectives.description: They think the art is interesting and important.
They are excited to show their work.
